_comment: Locked tier hashes for PANAMA 3.87% 07/23/2060 (US698299BL70). Source: SEC EDGAR 424B5 0001193125-20-252589, BOND_BASIS_30_360 confirmed. Reference: codebase-mcp memory id 260. Sinker: amortizes in 3 equal tranches on 2058-07-23, 2059-07-23, 2060-07-23 — flagged via structural_flags.is_sinker so consumers know to apply the schedule downstream. Any change to the hash values requires a SCHEMA.md MAJOR version bump.
